web_search.description: Search the web using DuckDuckGo. Modes: search (default), news, read (fetch full page text), fetch (specific URL). Params: query (str), mode (str), max_results (int, default 5), fetch_top (int, default 1), url (str for fetch mode).

database.description: Create and manage databases and tables. PostgreSQL primary, SQLite fallback. IMPORTANT — each action needs ALL its params in ONE call: (1) list_dbs: action only. (2) create_db: action + database. (3) create_table: action + database + table + schema (schema = dict of col_name:col_type). (4) insert: action + database + table + data (dict or list of dicts). (5) query: action + database + query (SELECT string only). (6) list_tables: action + database. (7) describe_table: action + database + table. (8) drop_table: action + database + table.

data_reader.description: Read and analyze data files (CSV, Excel, JSON) and database tables. Returns structured summaries Hayeong can reason about without loading full data into context. Use before working with any dataset to understand its shape and contents.
